database.name: VIEW SSPRJ_PROJECT_PRODUCT_V
database.view: SELECT tp.sproctm_task_prod_id AS ssprj_project_product_v_id, wh.ad_client_id, wh.ad_org_id, 'Y' AS isactive, now() AS created, '100' AS createdby, now() AS updated, '100' AS updatedby, pr.value, pr.name, pp.c_project_id, pp.c_projectphase_id, pt.c_projecttask_id, wh.m_warehouse_id, l.m_locator_id, sd.qtyonhand, sd.c_uom_id, sd.m_attributesetinstance_id, tp.qty AS qty_required, tp.em_ssprj_qty_transferred AS qty_transferred, tp.em_ssprj_qty_consumed AS qty_consumed, tp.qty - tp.em_ssprj_qty_transferred AS qty_deliver, tp.qty - tp.em_ssprj_qty_consumed AS qty_consume FROM sproctm_task_prod tp JOIN m_product pr ON pr.m_product_id = tp.m_product_id JOIN c_projecttask pt ON pt.c_projecttask_id = tp.c_projecttask_id JOIN c_projectphase pp ON pp.c_projectphase_id = pt.c_projectphase_id AND pp.em_sproctm_prhasetype = 'E' JOIN m_storage_detail sd ON sd.m_product_id = pr.m_product_id AND sd.qtyonhand > 0 JOIN m_locator l ON l.m_locator_id = sd.m_locator_id JOIN m_warehouse wh ON wh.m_warehouse_id = l.m_warehouse_id
